_doc: KARTA projektu glosnik = jedyne zrodlo prawdy. Archetyp gadzet-handsPOV. Produkt: 5w1 glosnik indukcyjny z ladowarka (5-in-1 Bluetooth phone-stand + wireless charger + speaker + RGB light). Wariant CZARNY (operator decyzja).

product.anatomy_str: A 5-in-1 desktop gadget in glossy piano-black: a square tilting head with a flat glossy black front face framed by a bright emissive RGB edge-light glowing in a smooth magenta-pink to cyan-blue gradient; one round chrome-silver knob on the side of the head; the head is mounted on a fold-out triangular phone-stand base of the same glossy black with a small raised front lip where a phone rests; the back of the head has a round mesh speaker grille and a row of tiny physical buttons along the top edge
product.functional_count: exactly 1 square RGB-rimmed head + 1 chrome side knob + 1 fold-out triangular base + 1 round rear mesh speaker grille - this exact set, identical in every scene
product.exactly_one: EXACTLY ONE device in the scene (one square RGB head on one triangular stand); any second hand is EMPTY and holds nothing

scenography.layout: one canonical dark modern desk: matte black desktop, a soft-glow mechanical keyboard and mouse partly visible behind at left, a dim monitor edge with faint blue RGB ambient behind; the device sits front-center-right of frame
scenography.swiatlo: low-key moody desk lighting, cool blue key light with subtle magenta and cyan RGB ambient bounce from the device; dark clean background, shallow depth of field

action_steps: a fingertip taps the top edge of the head and the RGB edge-light blooms to life
a hand lowers a phone onto the front lip so it rests upright against the panel
the phone sits charging while the speaker plays and the RGB rim pulses
a hand slowly rotates the device about 80 degrees to reveal the round rear mesh speaker grille
the device sits glowing on the desk with the phone charging
a fingertip touches and turns the chrome side knob
grammar.both_hands: the device stays on the desk; only ONE hand acts at a time (taps / lowers phone / rotates / touches knob), the other hand is EMPTY and out of frame; in the rotation scene the acting hand grips the base and the phone is not held
grammar.physics: the phone rests in the front lip under gravity and never floats; the RGB is an emissive edge-light, NOT a screen; rotation is a slow partial turn on the desk plane, NO full 360-degree spin (rigid parts ghost); the chrome knob rotates in place; hands contact real surfaces

screens_and_text: the phone screen shows only a generic dark music-player UI with blurred illegible controls and no brand icons; no readable text, numbers, logos or wordmarks anywhere on the device or in frame
